sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters"> <x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_class_name>x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>rjoy</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2022-06-05 18:15:34</sys_created_on> <sys_id>0b2d0217db7f49901e1792c5d49619d3</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Awaiting OU Assignment</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Tasker" source="x_153465_discovert">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Tasker">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters_0b2d0217db7f49901e1792c5d49619d3</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>rjoy</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2022-06-05 18:15:34</sys_updated_on> <u_active>true</u_active> <u_banner_list_page_id>discovertasker_detailsdrilldown</u_banner_list_page_id> <u_banner_list_view_name>sp</u_banner_list_view_name> <u_direction>desc</u_direction> <u_discover_controller_url>false</u_discover_controller_url> <u_field_list/> <u_filter>active=true^state=-5^primary_assignee=NULL</u_filter> <u_filter_label>Awaiting OU Assignment</u_filter_label> <u_filter_menu_header>banner_organizational_task_management</u_filter_menu_header> <u_filter_page>my_task_home_page</u_filter_page> <u_hover_field/> <u_include_comments>true</u_include_comments> <u_modal_title_field_separator>:</u_modal_title_field_separator> <u_modal_title_fields/> <u_order>300</u_order> <u_order_by>sys_updated_on</u_order_by> <u_show_in_filter_menu>false</u_show_in_filter_menu> <u_table display_value="Task" name="x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance">eabc200ddb0401101e1792c5d4961955</u_table> <u_view_all_page/> </x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters> </record_update>
